videos.headline: Ollie Gordon carves up BYU with 3 TDs in first half
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Ollie Gordon II shows out in the first half against BYU with two rushing touchdowns and one receiving score, totaling over 100 yards from scrimmage.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Ollie Gordon carves up BYU with 3 TDs in first half) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Retzlaff's 50-yard dime to Lassiter sets up BYU touchdown
videos.description: Jake Retzlaff chucks it deep and connects with Darius Lassiter on a 50-yard completion, setting up a short rushing score for BYU in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Retzlaff's 50-yard dime to Lassiter sets up BYU touchdown) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: OSU's Ollie Gordon makes 50-yard house call to even score
videos.description: Ollie Gordon II finds an open lane and houses a 50-yard rushing touchdown to tie the score for Oklahoma State against BYU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OSU's Ollie Gordon makes 50-yard house call to even score) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tanner Wall's timely interception leads to BYU score
videos.description: LJ Martin punches in a short rushing score to give BYU a 14-7 lead following a pick from Tanner Wall against OSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tanner Wall's timely interception leads to BYU score) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: BYU's LJ Martin rumbles for 2nd TD vs. OSU
videos.description: BYU's LJ Martin makes multiple defenders miss en route to the end zone for his second score of the game vs. Oklahoma State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BYU’s LJ Martin rumbles for 2nd TD vs. OSU) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jake Retzlaff connects with Keelan Marion for a BYU touchdown
videos.description: Jake Retzlaff fires a dart to Keelan Marion for a 34-yard touchdown that puts BYU in front of Oklahoma State 28-21.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Retzlaff connects with Keelan Marion for a BYU touchdown) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: OSU get tricky with double-pass TD vs. BYU
videos.description: Oklahoma State ties the score against BYU after Alan Bowman finds the end zone on a slick double-pass touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OSU get tricky with double-pass TD vs. BYU) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: OSU's Garret Rangel exits game after rough landing
videos.description: Oklahoma State quarterback Garret Rangel heads to the locker room against BYU after landing awkwardly on a 54-yard rush in the second quarter

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OSU’s Garret Rangel exits game after rough landing) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brennan Presley puts OSU ahead late with clutch TD grab
videos.description: Brennan Presley shakes his defender and dashes into the end zone to give Oklahoma State a 35-31 lead over BYU in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brennan Presley puts OSU ahead late with clutch TD grab) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
